CREATE TABLE demo_table (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE demo_table2 (id INT, demo_id INT, data VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (demo_id) REFERENCES demo_table(id));
CREATE TABLE demo_table3 (id INT, demo_id INT, data VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (demo_id) REFERENCES demo_table2(id));
INSERT INTO demo_table3 VALUES (1, 1, 'nested related data 1');
INSERT INTO demo_table3 VALUES (2, 2, 'nested related data 2');
INSERT INTO demo_table3 VALUES (3, 3, 'nested related data 3');
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_demo (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
SELECT JSON_OBJECT('id', id, 'data', data) FROM demo_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM demo_table);
